category_title: Students who exhibit task avoidance through vocalizations and floor-dropping behaviors
scenario_title: Transitioning from classroom chair to O&M lesson
minimal_context: The student is transitioning from a classroom chair to start an Orientation and Mobility lesson with the instructor.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for your O&M lesson. Please rise up from your chair.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Immediately begins to scream and cry, and will not stand up.)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Immediately drops to the floor and starts screaming.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Picks the child up, puts her feet under the child's, and holds him while physically prompting him to walk) We need to walk now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Acts as dead weight and continues crying.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for your O&M lesson. Please rise up from your chair.

STUDENT: (Immediately begins to scream and cry, and will not stand up.)

TUTOR: Come on, let's get going.

STUDENT: (Immediately drops to the floor and starts screaming.)

TUTOR: (Picks the child up, puts her feet under the child's, and holds him while physically prompting him to walk) We need to walk now.

STUDENT: (Acts as dead weight and continues crying.)

task.content: Transitioning from a classroom chair to start an Orientation and Mobility lesson

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the O&M instructor tells him to rise up from his chair and that it is time for his O&M lesson
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: The student immediately begins to scream and cry, and will not stand up. The child immediately drops to the floor and starts screaming.

behavior_patterns.condition: When the instructor picks the child up and puts her feet under the child's and holds him while physically prompting him to walk
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: The child is still dead weight and is crying.
